title: Tokoni
subtitle: Ngaahi tataki mo e ngaahi tali ke maʻu ai e meʻa lahi mei hoʻo tohi.
searchLabel: Kumi ʻa e ngaahi tohi tokoni
noResults: ʻIkai ha tohi ʻoku tatau mo e "{{query}}".

allFeatures.title: Vakai ki he ngaahi meʻa kotoa
allFeatures.subtitle: Ko e fakahokohoko kakato ʻo e meʻa kotoa pē te ke malava — ʻoku fakaʻata ʻa e meʻa kotoa ki heʻene tataki.

openCenter: Fakaʻata ʻa e Senita Tokoni kakato

machineTranslationBanner.label: Liliu fakaʻate
machineTranslationBanner.body: Naʻe liliu fakaʻate ʻa e tohi ni. Kataki mo e ngaahi hala — ʻomai ha fakamatala ke mau lava ʻo fakatonutonu.

palette.title: Tokoni
palette.description: Kumi ʻi he Senita Tokoni pe puna ki ha hala fakanounou.
palette.shortcutsHeading: Ngaahi hala fakanounou ʻo e kīpoti
